calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert Cantley, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Kentile Floors, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on April 10, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, October 9, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at the default prove-up hearing was filed on September 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert Cantley, and against the Defaulted Defendant Kentile Floors, Inc. as follows:

Interest - $256.24.
Costs - $309.40, for a total judgment in the amount of $565.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
